html:
Exclusive to:

The Buoyant Chiminea is a craftable Structure introduced in the Shipwrecked DLC. It is found in the Light Tab and requires 4 Sand, 6 Tar and 6 Limestones to craft. A Buoyant Chiminea works similar to a normal Chiminea, as it is also not affected by Strong Winds or Rain, however, it can only be placed on the Ocean.

One Charcoal will be dropped by a Buoyant Chiminea that has reached at least 3/4 of the way to maximum fuel (or 3 logs) when it goes out.

Trivia

  • The Buoyant Chiminea was added to the Shipwrecked DLC more than a year after its official completion in the Home Sea Home update, after being tested in a beta branch for several months.
  • The Buoyant Chiminea was originally named the Galley but was renamed before the beta was released.

Gallery

  • Buoyant Chiminea as seen in the poster for the Home Sea Home update.
Craftable ItemsStructures

"sea_chiminea"
“Science protect my fires out here.”
–Wilson
“Burn the sea!!”
–Willow
“Wolfgang will make fire at sea.”
–Wolfgang
“Afloat upon its own demise.”
–Wendy
“NEITHER OF US BELONG OUT HERE”
–WX-78
“That should serve my purposes nicely.”
–Wickerbottom
“Lil water never stopped a woodsman.”
–Woodie
“It will protect the flames from the waves.”
–Maxwell
“Efficiently contains an exothermic reaction on the water.”
–Wagstaff
“Tö prötect my fires fröm Aegir's grasp.”
–Wigfrid
“We used coral to corral the fire!”
–Webber
“I taught the fire how to surf.”
–Walani
“Is this a fire hazard, or a boating hazard?”
–Warly
“Prote'tion frum th'waves.”
–Woodlegs
“MAKETH THE FWOOSH ON THE WATER”
–Wilba
“Not too close”
–Wormwood
“I know a thing or two about hot air.”
–Wheeler
The Buoyant Chiminea is a craftable Structure introduced in the Shipwrecked DLC. It is found in the Light Tab and requires 4 Sand, 6 Tar and 6 Limestones to craft. A Buoyant Chiminea works similar to a normal Chiminea, as it is also not affected by Strong Winds or Rain, however, it can only be placed on the Ocean.
One Charcoal will be dropped by a Buoyant Chiminea that has reached at least 3/4 of the way to maximum fuel (or 3 logs) when it goes out.
Trivia[edit | edit source]
The Buoyant Chiminea was added to the Shipwrecked DLC more than a year after its official completion in the Home Sea Home update, after being tested in a beta branch for several months.
The Buoyant Chiminea was originally named the Galley but was renamed before the beta was released.

summaryViHtml:
Tóm tắt

Ống Khói Nổi là một Kiến Trúc chế tạo được giới thiệu trong DLC ​​Shipwrecked. Nó được tìm thấy trong Thẻ Ánh Sáng và cần 4 Cát, 6 Nhựa Đường và 6 Đá Vôi để chế tạo. Chiminea nổi hoạt động tương tự như Chiminea bình thường, vì nó không bị ảnh hưởng bởi Gió mạnh hoặc Mưa, tuy nhiên, nó chỉ có thể được đặt trên Đại dương.
title: Buoyant Chiminea

One [[Charcoal]] will be dropped by a Buoyant Chiminea that has reached at least 3/4 of the way to maximum fuel (or 3 logs) when it goes out. =={{Pic32|Placeholder}} Trivia== * The Buoyant Chiminea was added to the ''Shipwrecked'' DLC more than a year after its official completion in the ''[[Don't Starve: Shipwrecked#November 21st, 2017 - Home Sea Home Update|Home Sea Home]]'' update, after being tested in a beta branch for several months. * The Buoyant Chiminea was originally named the Galley but was renamed before the beta was released. =={{Pic32|Blueprint}} Gallery== DS Shipwrecked Home Sea Home Update.png|Buoyant Chiminea as seen in the poster for the ''[[Don't Starve: Shipwrecked#November 21, 2017 - Home Sea Home Update|Home Sea Home]]'' update. {{clear}} Craftable Items= {{Craftable Items|structure}} |-| Structures= {{Naturally Spawning Objects}} [[vi:Buoyant Chiminea]] [[Category:Light Sources]] [[Category:Light Tab]] [[Category:Craftable Structures]]
